title: Remembering Things
knowledge_note: The brain stores memories so you can use them later. Computers do the same thing with variables — little named boxes that hold values.
explanation: The keyword 'remember' creates a variable — a named box to store a value. You can then use that name anywhere to get the value back.
worked_example:
remember name = "Yusuf"
remember age = 12
say name
say age
challenge: Remember your age and say it.
hint: Use remember age = (your age) then say age.
